content: I will modify `fetchTempleCatalog` in `app/settings_detail.tsx` to query temple names from both `general_poojas` and `website_pooja_products` tables, and merge them into the catalog mappings.

args.Description: "Updating fetchTempleCatalog to merge temple mappings from both general_poojas and website_pooja_products in settings_detail.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Query both general_poojas and website_pooja_products tables in fetchTempleCatalog to aggregate all temple associations"
